texto: Whether it's possible or not, being a doctor, you take an oath. To care for your patient, not to kill them. You take an oath to do things that are proper in the medical world. Not to administer something outside of a hospital setting that's not even your area.
explicacao: Citação de Jermaine Jackson sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Whether it's possible or not, being a doctor, you take an oath. To care for your patient, not to …” articula reflexao, doctor, world em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como world e care.
